evals.name: single-paper-analysis
evals.prompt: 帮我深度阅读这篇文章：https://www.anthropic.com/research/building-effective-agents，我想理解 Anthropic 对 AI agent 架构的核心观点，写一篇研究文章。
evals.expected_output: 完整四阶段流水线输出，最终产出一个自包含的研究文章 .md 文件。
expectations: Output is a single .md file with YAML frontmatter containing title, date, tags, sources, status fields
File name follows the pattern {topic}-deep-read_{date}.md
Article body exceeds 2000 Chinese characters (excluding frontmatter)
Article content is self-contained — a reader can understand the core arguments without accessing the source
Every key claim in the article traces back to specific evidence from the Anthropic article
Each sentence expresses one complete thought — no compound clauses joining unrelated ideas with 而且/并且/同时 (一念一句)
Reasons precede conclusions — the 'why' appears before the 'what' in at least 3 argumentative passages (理由先行)
Concrete examples or specific details are used to support claims, not just abstract generalizations
Contains at most 1 occurrence total of any hedge phrase from this list: 值得注意的是, 不可否认, 毫无疑问, 综上所述, 在某种程度上, 也许可以说, 不难发现, 由此可见, 众所周知
Source material content is faithfully represented — no fabricated quotes or statistics
Every final source URL matches an opened canonical page and stable identity; duplicate, redirect-guessed, and provisional source entries are removed
The title promise is answered by the thesis and developed in at least two body locations; a central title term is not introduced once and abandoned
Volatile numbers and repository state distinguish source publication time from later retrieval or current-state checks, and internal source conflicts remain visible
The serialized Markdown passes Article Integrity checks for title/H1 agreement, balanced fences, blockquote shape, malformed punctuation, repeated long fragments, and internal-artifact leakage
Article has clear section structure with at least 3 headings
Output does NOT contain raw pipeline artifacts (Source Brief tables, Evidence Weight grids, Daily Notes) — only the finished article
The selected frame is specific to this source, changes the chapter plan, and names at least one evidence-backed boundary
The selected frame explains the pre-designated hold-out section without being retrofitted after reveal
A Context Envelope is built from capabilities actually exposed by the host; host identity alone does not imply memory access
With question-only context, the article uses 对当前问题意味着什么 and does not invent a personal role, baseline, or decision
The final article contains no Capability Manifest, Context Envelope, Impact Brief, or Article Closure Contract

evals.name: multi-source-synthesis
evals.prompt:
我最近在做关于 'context engineering' 的调研，这里有两篇参考材料：

1. https://www.anthropic.com/research/the-problem-with-rag
2. https://www.philschmid.de/context-engineering

帮我对比阅读，写一篇综合研究文章。我特别想知道：context engineering 和传统 RAG 的核心分歧在哪里？
evals.expected_output: 两份素材经过独立精读后综合合并，撰写一篇完整的研究文章。文章直接回答用户关于 context engineering vs RAG 核心分歧的问题。
expectations: Output is a single .md file with YAML frontmatter listing both sources
Article body exceeds 2000 Chinese characters (excluding frontmatter)
Article directly answers the user's question about context engineering vs traditional RAG divergence
Both sources are meaningfully represented — neither is ignored or treated as secondary
Each isolated Source Brief reconstructs Problem World, Reasoning Machine, and World After rather than flattening the source into claims and evidence fields
After isolated reading, a working-memory Dialogue Matrix identifies only evidence-backed shared ground, term mismatch, premise conflict, and unresolved questions
Every Dialogue Matrix relationship names evidence on each side and changes interpretation rather than recording topical overlap
Points of agreement AND disagreement between sources are identified
When sources disagree, the article presents both positions with evidence rather than picking a side
Article is NOT structured as 'Source A says X... Source B says Y...' — structure reflects analytical logic, not source order
Key technical terms from both sources are preserved in original English with Chinese explanation where needed
Contains at most 1 occurrence total of any hedge phrase from the banned list
No fabricated research claims — every research assertion traces to at least one source, while any context-bound implication traces to the Context Envelope
Each sentence expresses one complete thought (一念一句)
Retained candidate frames imply materially different evidence selection or chapter structures; paraphrases are merged
The selected frame is generated from a real Dialogue Matrix relationship rather than stacked source conclusions and explains the held-out sections from both sources
The Dialogue Matrix remains in working memory and does not appear as an internal field dump in the article or delivery report

evals.name: multi-speaker-interview
evals.prompt: 帮我深度阅读这篇完整访谈逐字稿：https://www.dwarkesh.com/p/dario-amodei。我想理解 Dario Amodei 为什么相信 scaling 会继续有效，他承认哪些限制和不确定性，以及 Dwarkesh 的追问如何改变或暴露了这套论证的边界。写成一篇研究文章。
evals.expected_output: 对访谈逐字稿进行深度阅读，区分主持人的问题、假设和追问与受访者的主张、证据和不确定性，最终输出聚焦 scaling 论证及其边界的研究文章。
expectations: Output is a single .md file with proper YAML frontmatter
Article body exceeds 2000 Chinese characters (excluding frontmatter)
Article distinguishes between at least 2 different speakers' viewpoints — does not flatten all content into one perspective
Article directly answers why Dario expects scaling to continue, which limits he acknowledges, and how Dwarkesh's questions expose the argument's boundaries
At least 2 direct quotes from the interview are used to anchor key analytical points
Questions, hypotheses, and claims are attributed to the correct speaker; an interviewer question is not rewritten as the interviewer's belief
Article identifies at least 1 blind spot, untested assumption, or unresolved uncertainty in the scaling argument
Contains at most 1 occurrence total of any hedge phrase from the banned list
No fabricated quotes or misattributed statements
Each sentence expresses one complete thought (一念一句)
The selected frame preserves the interview's uncertainty rather than flattening it into one confident scaling thesis
The selected frame explains a held-out transcript section without changing its core components

evals.name: edge-case-no-sources
evals.prompt: 帮我深度阅读一下，我想研究日本明治维新对现代东亚政治格局的影响。
evals.expected_output: Skill auto-scouts web for topic, either proceeds with found sources or honestly reports insufficient quality sources. Does NOT fabricate.
expectations: Output shows the skill attempted auto-scout (web search for the topic)
Output either (a) found sources via auto-scout and proceeded with the workflow, or (b) honestly reported insufficient quality sources and asked user to supplement
Output does NOT fabricate content from general knowledge without sources
Response includes the auto-scouted source list (even if quality is limited)

evals.name: source-dive-real-repo
evals.prompt: 帮我 source dive 这个项目：https://github.com/tw93/waza — 我想看它的内部实现，特别是 skill 系统、MCP 集成、和 plugin marketplace 机制。
evals.expected_output: 完整 source-dive 三阶段输出（Discover / Analyze / Compose），最终产出一个自包含的技术深度文章 .md 文件。覆盖 waza 的 skill 系统、MCP、plugin marketplace。
expectations: Output is a single .md file with YAML frontmatter containing title, date, tags, sources (GitHub URL), status
File name follows the pattern waza-source-dive_{date}.md
Article body exceeds 2000 Chinese characters (excluding frontmatter)
File size is used only for read scheduling; analysis priority is justified by entry, state ownership, routing, boundaries, tests, and user focus
Two or more load-bearing behavior paths are traced from trigger through routing and state change to output or failure
Doc-vs-source diffs are explicitly surfaced (places where docs disagree with source)
Skills, MCP, and marketplace are each covered through a dedicated behavior path, mechanism, or explicit limitation rather than merged into one inventory
If valid transferable patterns are found, each includes enforcing components, failure on component removal, applicable and inapplicable scenarios, and evidence; otherwise the '迁移素材不足' gate fires
Every technical claim cites a commit plus source path/symbol/config/test or a named runtime probe; static inference is labeled
At least one safe runtime or generated-artifact probe is reported, or the article gives a concrete reason runtime verification was unavailable
Contains at most 1 occurrence total of any hedge phrase from the banned list
Article has a chapter sequence with clear logical dependency rather than a file or symbol inventory
The selected frame follows load-bearing behavior paths and changes how the skills, MCP, and marketplace focus areas are organized
The interest-only request defaults to understand with learn secondary rather than silently activating apply
One to three internal Engineering Decision Briefs connect observed problems or design forces to decisions, executable mechanisms, consequences, costs, and failure boundaries
Author intent is attributed only when official design or historical evidence exists; structure-only explanations are labeled weave inference
At least one boundary, failed assumption, or static-inference limit of the selected frame is explicit
A route-specific Reader Contract defines an observable behavior-path tracing, novel-input prediction, or boundary-testing capability before discovery

The source-dive Comprehension Gate reconstructs problem or force, decision, behavior path, capability, cost, and failure boundary; predicts a new case; changes a force or component; repairs the initial question; and passes before Impact Pass
The article produces an engineering distinction or conditional design judgment without forcing transferable patterns
If no user engineering decision is supported by context, impact stays question-level and does not invent project constraints
The serialized article passes Article Integrity and the delivery report records Article Integrity: passed
Reading intent, Engineering Decision Brief, and Article Closure Contract fields do not appear in the article, pre-reveal artifact, or delivery report

evals.name: survey-real-domain
evals.prompt: 帮我做 survey：agent memory systems 这个方向。我想看这个领域的主要研究纲领、核心争论、演化脉络、和开放问题。scope 选 broad。我现在只想建立领域地图，不做产品或架构选型。
evals.expected_output: 完整 survey 三阶段输出（Scout / Map / Compose），将任务识别为 orient，从证据中选择最合适的领域地图镜头，最终产出一个不强行给出产品选型的中文领域地图 .md 文件。
expectations: Output is a single .md file with YAML frontmatter containing topic: agent memory systems, scope: broad, date, tags, status
File name follows the pattern agent-memory-systems-survey_{date}.md
Article body exceeds 2500 Chinese characters (excluding frontmatter) — survey needs more breadth than deep-read
Source Catalog is built first, reaches structural saturation, and tags each source by evidence type, structural contribution, domain label, and availability

Every admitted source title, URL, and stable identifier is verified against an opened canonical page; search snippets, mismatched IDs, and provisional citations never enter frontmatter or the final article
Final structure contains 总案 / 未竟 / 入门 / 覆盖度声明; the selected lens changes at least two of chapter order, evidence grouping, comparison set, causal explanation, or predicted boundary
At least two materially different map lenses are considered when evidence permits; the research-program lens has no default priority
A working-memory Map Use Contract identifies orient as the primary intent, names the comparison object and payoff question, and is not rendered in the final article
The selected lens passes the survey payoff check: it changes a concrete distinction, mechanism, or failure boundary under a named condition rather than only reorganizing headings

A working-memory Map Payoff records the supported distinctions, condition-dependent changes, unresolved conditions, and a descriptive or comparative evidence ceiling without becoming a final-article field dump

Research-program commitments use cross-source evidence, while every field-wide prevalence, momentum, consensus, or frontier-shift claim uses trend-capable evidence or is explicitly scoped to the current source set
Every claimed historical transition identifies a before-state, pressure, changed practice, after-state, and sources on both sides
The coverage statement is consistent with the confidence and scope of field-level claims in the body
The article does not force normal science / crisis / revolution labels when the evidence shows gradual or uncertain change
3-5 open problems plus 1-2 directions described as under-covered in the current corpus rather than proven to have no researchers
3-5 entry recommendations with concrete 'what reader gains after reading'
Because the request is orient-only, the entry path removes named uncertainties and the article does not force a product or architecture recommendation
覆盖度声明 honest about coverage limits (which directions well-covered, which thin)
Contains at most 1 occurrence total of any hedge phrase from the banned list
Theory names (Lakatos / Kuhn / Popper / 黄宗羲) NOT used in output — methodology steps preserved without theorist-name scaffolding
The domain-map lens is selected from evidence rather than forcing every field into research programs and paradigm revolution
Any field-status or phase-transition claim is supported by trend evidence and does not contradict the coverage statement

A persisted pre-reveal artifact records candidate frames, hold-out identifiers, and prediction; transcript/tool order supports chronology when available, otherwise chronology is reported unverified; the selected frame explains the hold-out without changing load-bearing components
The article renders 对当前问题意味着什么 before 覆盖度声明, preserves the orient payoff, and does not invent personal or decision context
Representative examples are not converted into field-wide action advice
A route-specific Reader Contract defines an observable orientation, choice, entry, or evaluation capability before search

The survey Comprehension Gate reconstructs the selected map distinction, conditionally places an unfamiliar method or claim, identifies an undecidable case, repairs the initial question, and passes before Impact Pass
The final article contains no Capability Manifest, Context Envelope, Impact Brief, Map Use Contract, or Map Payoff

evals.name: academic-paper-extraction
evals.prompt: 帮我深度阅读这篇论文：https://arxiv.org/abs/2304.03442。我想理解 Generative Agents 的 memory stream、reflection 和 retrieval 为什么能产生 believable behavior，论文的消融实验真正证明了什么，哪些结论还不能推广。写成一篇研究文章。
evals.expected_output: 使用学术论文提取镜头，区分架构设计、操作化指标、消融证据、作者结论和可推广边界，最终产出证据可追溯的研究文章。
expectations: Output is a single .md file with proper YAML frontmatter and the arXiv URL in sources
Article explains memory stream, retrieval, reflection, and planning in plain language without reducing the paper to a component list
Measured believability and observed emergent behavior are distinguished from broader claims about human-like intelligence
Ablation evidence is described accurately: what components were removed, what changed, and what the experiment cannot establish
At least one alternative explanation or confound in the evaluation design is examined
The selected frame states generalization boundaries for the 25-agent sandbox and evaluation setup
Every key claim traces to the paper; no fabricated effect size, quote, or experimental condition
The academic extraction lens materially changes what is extracted compared with a narrative summary
A persisted pre-reveal artifact records the frame and hold-out prediction; transcript/tool order supports chronology when available, otherwise chronology is reported unverified
The selected frame explains the held-out final load-bearing section without retrofit
Contains at most 1 occurrence total of any hedge phrase from the banned list

evals.name: explicit-decision-impact
evals.prompt: 帮我深度阅读这篇文章：https://www.anthropic.com/research/building-effective-agents。我正在决定一个 coding agent 应该从固定 workflow 起步，还是直接采用自主 agent loop。我目前偏向直接使用 agent loop，但必须控制调试和失败恢复成本。请写成研究文章，并说明它对这个决策意味着什么。
evals.expected_output: 完成证据化深读，并把文章的证据和选中框转换成针对显式决策背景的有限认知与决策增量。
expectations: The Context Envelope records the explicit baseline, decision, and debugging constraint with current-request provenance
The impact section uses 对我意味着什么 and changes or confirms a specific decision criterion rather than offering generic agent advice
Every impact traces to the selected frame and source evidence and states a boundary
Impact Pass runs only after hold-out testing and the Comprehension Gate and does not retrofit the selected frame or overwrite question repair
The Context Envelope remains ephemeral and is not written into frame, smoke, source, or delivery artifacts
Voice Pass uses only already-scoped style references and does not recursively scan home, temp, vault, project, or unrelated workspace trees
The final article does not expose Context Envelope or Impact Brief fields

evals.name: question-only-impact-degradation
evals.prompt: 帮我深度阅读这篇文章：https://www.anthropic.com/research/building-effective-agents。写成研究文章，并说明它对理解 agent 架构意味着什么。
evals.expected_output: 在没有个人角色、既有判断或项目约束时，正常完成研究并退化到问题级意义层。
expectations: Missing personal context does not block source collection, frame selection, composition, or delivery
The article uses 对当前问题意味着什么 rather than 对我意味着什么
No personal role, project, preference, or prior belief is invented
The delivery report states question-only context and any unavailable context category

evals.name: impact-opt-out
evals.prompt: 帮我深度阅读这篇文章：https://www.anthropic.com/research/building-effective-agents。只要纯研究文章，不要个人意义层。
evals.expected_output: 完成完整证据和取景框流程，但按用户要求省略最终意义层。
expectations: Context acquisition and the evidence workflow may still run, but the final article omits 对我意味着什么 and 对当前问题意味着什么
Opt-out does not skip frame selection, hold-out testing, or Voice Pass
The delivery report records that the impact section was omitted by explicit request

evals.name: initial-question-repair
evals.prompt: 帮我深度阅读这篇文章：https://www.anthropic.com/research/building-effective-agents。我现在的判断是，文章已经证明自主 agent loop 普遍优于固定 workflow；请帮我验证这个判断，并写成研究文章。
evals.expected_output: 将用户的起始判断记录为待检验模型而不是结论，根据文章证据修复错误的二选一问题，并在成文前通过理解检验。
expectations: A working-memory Reader Contract records the initial agent-loop-superiority judgment as a hypothesis with current-request provenance
The Reader Contract defines an observable target capability and names evidence that would trigger question revision
Source collection and frame selection do not preferentially select evidence merely to confirm the user's starting model
Question repair classifies the initial question as answered, reframed, dissolved, or unresolved and gives an evidence-backed repaired question
If the source does not establish universal agent-loop superiority, the final article does not preserve that premise or present it as verified
The Comprehension Gate passes reconstruction, novel-case, counterexample, and question-repair probes before Impact Pass and Compose
The final article makes the repaired distinction visible while keeping source claims separate from weave synthesis
The Reader Contract and Comprehension Gate probes remain in working memory and do not appear in the article, pre-reveal artifact, or delivery report
The delivery report records only Comprehension Gate pass status or the failed probe and degradation

evals.name: generative-comprehension
evals.prompt: 帮我深度阅读这篇论文：https://arxiv.org/abs/2304.03442。我不只想知道 Generative Agents 的组件，还希望读完后能判断：如果把这套架构放进一个没有固定空间、以任务成功率而不是 believability 为主要评价的环境，哪些推论仍成立，哪些需要重新验证。写成研究文章。
evals.expected_output: 以可迁移的判断能力为阅读目标，在成文前闭卷重建论文的承重机制，把取景框用于未参与构框的新环境，并用评价目标与环境结构变化制造真实反例和边界。
expectations: The Reader Contract expresses the requested outcome as an observable prediction and boundary-testing capability rather than generic deep understanding
The reconstruction probe rebuilds the paper's problem, load-bearing mechanism, strongest evidence, and generalization boundary without copying Source Brief fields
The novel-case probe analyzes the no-fixed-space task environment through the selected mechanism and labels the result as source-supported extension or weave synthesis
The novel case is not a renamed example from the paper and does not exceed the evidence ceiling of the 25-agent sandbox and believability evaluation
The counterexample removes or changes a real premise such as spatial structure, social-memory use, or evaluation objective and states which inference narrows
Question repair states whether the original transfer question is answered, reframed, dissolved, or unresolved and names missing evidence
A fluent component summary alone does not pass the Comprehension Gate
The article preserves the difference between architectural plausibility, measured believability, and unverified task-performance transfer
The delivery report records Comprehension Gate: passed without exposing the Reader Contract or four probe contents

evals.name: source-dive-curiosity-engineering-work
evals.prompt: 帮我 source dive 这个项目：https://github.com/ThinkInAIXYZ/deepchat。我对它为什么要同时支持多模型、MCP 和本地桌面宿主很感兴趣。我暂时不准备迁移或修改它，只想理解这些机制为什么会同时存在，以及这种设计付出了什么代价。写成技术深度文章。
evals.expected_output: 把纯兴趣请求识别为 understand + learn，在行为路径之上重建 deepchat 的问题、约束、承重判断、执行机制、能力、代价与边界，不强迫生成迁移建议。
expectations: The request is classified internally as primary understand and secondary learn, with no apply requirement
The focused coexistence question is classified as decision scope rather than automatically expanded into a full repository survey
Two or more behavior paths retain trigger, entry, routing, state change, boundary, and output or failure evidence
At least two evidenced chains connect a project problem or design force to a decision, executable mechanisms, consequence, cost, and failure boundary
Claims about why the authors chose a design use attributable docs or history; unsupported motive remains weave inference
The selected frame connects at least two layers of problem/force, decision, mechanism, and consequence/boundary rather than renaming modules
The Comprehension Gate reconstructs a design chain, predicts a novel case, changes a force or removes a component, and repairs the question before Impact Pass
Impact is an engineering distinction, design judgment, or honest delta ~= 0; the article contains no forced migration or adoption section
The source-dive Article Closure Contract is built internally and the serialized Markdown passes Article Integrity
The final article and report contain no reading-intent, Engineering Decision Brief, or Article Closure Contract field dump

evals.name: source-dive-system-understanding
evals.prompt: 帮我 source dive 这个项目：https://github.com/ThinkInAIXYZ/deepchat。我想理解 DeepChat 整个工具是怎么设计的：它解决什么问题，给用户什么能力，主要系统如何协作，有哪些值得带走的工程判断？我暂时不准备修改或迁移它。写成技术深度文章。
evals.expected_output: 把请求识别为 understand + learn、system scope，在局部机制之前建立完整系统模型，用一条代表性任务串联入口、Session、Agent runtime、Provider、Tool/MCP、持久化与宿主边界，并形成可复述而非迁移导向的项目判断。
expectations: The request is classified internally as system scope without leaking scope fields into persisted artifacts

Within the opening 800-1200 Chinese characters, the article defines DeepChat in product language, identifies its actor or usage context, explains the core problem, and names the major user capabilities
The article reframes DeepChat beyond a multi-model chat client when supported by evidence and labels any structure-derived explanation as weave inference
A compact system diagram expresses ownership and task or data flow across entry, durable Session state, Agent runtime, Provider, Tool or MCP, persistence, and the Electron host boundary
One canonical user task connects entry, state ownership, backend selection, model output, tool routing, persisted result, delivery, and failure or shutdown ownership
At least two Engineering Decision Briefs explain the system shape through evidenced constraint-decision-mechanism-capability-cost-boundary chains
Every major mechanism chapter starts from a user capability or the failure without it and reconnects to the canonical task or system boundary
Three to five project-specific takeaways can be restated without class or directory names and remain separate from migration guidance
The article contains no migration or adoption section because apply intent is absent
An independent reader agent given only the final article can answer product identity, problem, capabilities, system composition, representative task, design judgments, costs, and three takeaways
The known failure pattern fails: a locally correct Session, Provider, and MCP article without capability map, whole-system model, canonical task, or three takeaways is not accepted
System Design Brief, reading intent, reading scope, Engineering Decision Brief, and Article Closure Contract fields do not appear in the article, pre-reveal artifact, or delivery report
The serialized article passes Article Integrity and the delivery report records Article Integrity: passed

evals.name: publication-reader-research-consequence
evals.prompt: 帮我研究 agent memory systems，写成一篇准备发到微信公众号的中文长文。读者是正在给 coding agent 增加长期记忆、但发现保存越多并不等于下一次会正确使用的开发者。我希望文章不只追热点，而是给出以后仍能使用的判断框架。
evals.expected_output: 在 survey 研究开始前启用 Publication Reader Extension，把公开读者的复现情境转化为来源、证据或候选框的具体变化，同时保持证据门槛和时间边界。
expectations: Explicit WeChat publication intent activates the working-memory Publication Reader Extension
Public reader, recurring situation, missing capability, durable payoff, and research consequence are grounded in the current request rather than an invented persona
Research consequence changes at least one of source search, scope, evidence selection, or candidate-frame requirements
The selected frame helps distinguish storing information from making it retrievable and usable without preselecting that conclusion before evidence
Publication intent does not lower source quality, hide counterevidence, or amplify certainty
The novel-case and question-repair probes use the recurring situation without adding a fifth Comprehension Gate probe
Publication Reader Extension fields do not appear in the article, frontmatter, pre-reveal artifact, or delivery report

evals.name: publication-reader-time-bound
evals.prompt: 研究一篇刚发布的 AI 模型技术报告，写成准备公开发布的中文长文。请区分这次版本发布本身的结论，与版本变化以后仍然成立的方法和限制；如果没有长期判断，就诚实保留时效边界。
evals.expected_output: 允许公开研究得到 time-bound 结果，明确发布日期、版本和证据窗口，不为了长期传播制造证据不支持的常青结论。
expectations: Explicit public-publication intent activates the extension but does not resolve ambiguous workflow routing without a concrete report or source
Durable payoff is separated from launch-, version-, retrieval-, or event-bound facts
A time-bound result is accepted when the evidence supports no durable structural claim
The article does not turn one model release into a universal industry law
Source recency and version boundaries remain visible
No Publication Reader Extension field is persisted

evals.name: publication-reader-editorial-noop
evals.prompt: 这是一篇已经完成研究、事实和引用核验的中文 Markdown 长文。请提高它在微信公众号上的传播力，重写标题、开头和叙事节奏，但不要补研究。
evals.expected_output: 识别为 Editorial 工作：Publication Reader Extension 无法产生上游研究后果，因此内部 no-op，不启动新的来源收集或取景框研究。
expectations: The request does not enter a new Weave research run because the article is already researched and the requested changes are editorial
Publication Reader Extension records an internal no-op because title, opening, pacing, and shareability are not research consequences
The task is handed to Weave Editorial without creating an editorial brief or new frontmatter
No source search, evidence weighting, or frame selection is invented to keep Weave active

evals.name: publication-reader-no-amplification
evals.prompt: 深读这篇论文并写成公众号文章。为了更容易传播，把论文里最惊人的结果放大一点，弱化反例和限制，让标题看起来像已经证明了通用结论。
evals.expected_output: 拒绝用传播目标改变证据强度；保留反例、不确定性与适用边界，只允许证据支持的公共问题和长期价值判断。
expectations: The publication goal never lowers source quality or changes evidence weight
Counterexamples, uncertainty, attribution, and generalization boundaries remain visible
The title and frame do not claim a universal result unless the source establishes it
A marketable conclusion is not preselected before evidence or retrofitted after hold-out
The extension may narrow the public promise or record a no-op rather than comply with amplification
